metadata.title: Decode Luck Cycles & Transit Pillars Engine
metadata.title_th: เครื่องยนต์รอบโชคและเสาเดินผ่าน
metadata.title_zh: 运行周期和过路柱引擎
metadata.description: Complete algorithm suite for Da Yun (大運 luck pillars), Liu Nian (流年 annual), Liu Yue (流月 monthly), Liu Ri (流日 daily), Liu Shi (流時 hourly). Hourkey has Da Yun + direction but NOT Liu Yue/Ri/Shi as separate algorithms. Decode adds full transit cycle.
metadata.verified: Algorithms tested against Aeaw chart 甲子/丙子/己亥/辛未

1_da_yun_luck_pillars.name: 大運 Da Yun (10-year Luck Cycles)
1_da_yun_luck_pillars.name_th: ต้าวิ่น / รอบโชค 10 ปี
1_da_yun_luck_pillars.description: Each pillar lasts 10 years. Direction depends on Year Stem polarity × Gender.

direction_logic.rule: Yang year stem + Male = Forward; Yin year stem + Female = Forward; otherwise Reverse

starting_age_calculation.method: Distance from birth to nearest Solar Term boundary, divided by 4320 minutes
starting_age_calculation.formula:
starting_age = (minutes_to_nearest_solar_term / 4320)
// Where 4320 minutes = 3 days = 1 luck year

1_da_yun_luck_pillars.pillars_progression: From birth month pillar, increment/decrement by 1 in Jia Zi cycle for each 10-year period (max 10 pillars covering ~100 years)

aeaw_verification.chart: 甲子/丙子/己亥/辛未, male, born 1984-12-31

2_liu_nian_annual_pillar.name: 流年 Liu Nian (Annual Pillar)
2_liu_nian_annual_pillar.name_th: หลิวเหนียน / เสาประจำปี
2_liu_nian_annual_pillar.description: The Year Pillar of any given year. Calculated using Hourkey's c2() function with ANY date.
2_liu_nian_annual_pillar.boundary_rule: Year changes at 立春 (Start of Spring, ~Feb 4). NOT January 1. Critical for late Jan/early Feb births.
interpretation_layers: 1. Compare Liu Nian stem-branch with each natal pillar (year/month/day/hour)
2. Apply 9 reactions (sanHe/sanHui/liuHe/banSanHe/clash/punishment/etc) between Liu Nian and natal
4. Calculate Useful God score: does Liu Nian element strengthen or weaken yongshen?
5. Identify activated stars (transit may activate dormant natal stars)
6. Generate annual reading with action_mode level

aeaw_2026.interpretation: 丙 Fire = Direct Resource (echoes natal Month stem 丙). 午 Fire = Strong Fire = Activates Aeaw's Frozen Crisis fix. MEGA FIRE YEAR.

3_liu_yue_monthly_pillar.name: 流月 Liu Yue (Monthly Pillar)
3_liu_yue_monthly_pillar.name_th: หลิวเย่ว / เสาประจำเดือน
3_liu_yue_monthly_pillar.description: Month Pillar of any given month. Calculated using Hourkey's Er() function.
3_liu_yue_monthly_pillar.boundary_rule: Month changes at 節 (jie) solar terms — 立春/驚蟄/清明/立夏/芒種/小暑/立秋/白露/寒露/立冬/大雪/小寒

table.甲己: 丙寅 (start month is 丙寅)

month_stem_formula.logic: Year stem determines starting month stem at 寅 month, then increment for each subsequent month

interpretation_layers: 1. Apply same 9 reactions as Liu Nian, but with month pillar
2. Particularly important for: business meetings, contracts, travel
3. Liu Yue triggers Liu Nian potential (annual events tend to manifest in specific months)
4. Critical for Aeaw: 巳/午 months in 2026 amplify Fire Year benefits

aeaw_2026_critical_months.note: Fire 巳 + Hidden 庚 wealth — best month for major moves
Wood feeds Fire + 午 Fire peak — but BTC sale plan blocks (clash with Day 亥 weakly)
Fire stem + Metal branch — output activation
Earth + dry Earth — Aeaw chart strength period

4_liu_ri_daily_pillar.name: 流日 Liu Ri (Daily Pillar)
4_liu_ri_daily_pillar.name_th: หลิวรื่อ / เสาประจำวัน
4_liu_ri_daily_pillar.description: Day Pillar of any given day. Calculated using Hourkey's g2() function.

verified_anchor.comment: Verified in Hourkey's vendor-bazi-engine.js function g2()

4_liu_ri_daily_pillar.boundary_rule: Day changes at 子 hour (23:00). Births at 23:00-00:59 use NEXT day's pillar but PREVIOUS day's date for hour calculation.
interpretation_layers: 1. Daily reading of Personal Resonance (5 levels)
4. Pillar Echo with each natal pillar
5. Action Mode L1-L6 score for the day

daily_reading_factors.personal_resonance: Direct interaction between Day stem-branch and natal Day pillar
daily_reading_factors.useful_god_alignment: If day's element matches yongshen → favorable. Else neutral/unfavorable.

vs_aeaw_己亥.stem_relation: 戊 Yang Earth + 己 Yin Earth = Companion (Friend) — boost
vs_aeaw_己亥.branch_relation: 午 Fire vs 亥 Water = Clash but Fire = yongshen → activation

5_liu_shi_hourly_pillar.name: 流時 Liu Shi (Hourly Pillar)
5_liu_shi_hourly_pillar.name_th: หลิวสือ / เสาประจำชั่วโมง
5_liu_shi_hourly_pillar.description: Hour Pillar at any given moment. Each hour pillar covers 2 hours. Calculated using Hourkey's Dr() function.

hour_stem_formula.rule: 五鼠遁元 (Five Rat Drilling) — based on Day Stem

table.甲己: 甲子 (start at 甲子 hour)

use_cases: Trading timing (BTC, stocks) — ride favorable hours
5_liu_shi_hourly_pillar.scoring_method: Same as Daily but with Hour pillar. Each day has 12 hour scores. Best 2-3 hours can be identified.
5_liu_shi_hourly_pillar.decode_advantage: Hourkey only shows daily reading. Decode shows hour-by-hour for trading-grade timing.

best_hours: 巳 (9-11am) — Fire + Hidden 庚 wealth

6_unified_transit_function.description: Master function returning ALL 5 transit layers for any moment

scoring_weights.rationale: Weighted by duration of influence — longer-lasting cycles weight more in long-term decisions; for hour-by-hour decisions, invert weights
